name: Thetford Console Table Gray - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Display your decor items or potted plants in your entryway, hallway or in the living room on this Thetford Console Table from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This console table features a rectangle shape with an arched design in between the legs for added flair. The off-white wood finish easily coordinates with any decor, and you can simply spot clean for easy care.

Overall Width: 48 inches
Overall Height: 30 inches
Overall Depth: 13 inches
Distance between front legs: 42.5 inches
Distance between front leg and back leg: 7.5 inches
Table top thickness: 0.75 inches
